message:
🐛 Close agent status dropdown when mouse moves 20px away (#328)

Add mousemove listener that closes the dropdown when the cursor
moves more than 20px outside the component's bounding box. This
provides a smoother UX than requiring a click elsewhere to dismiss.
The existing click-outside handler is preserved as a fallback.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
